content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.bot_tracker_api
FILE: cosmos/web/bot_tracker_api.py (748 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Bot Tracker - Token ID Registration System
==========================================
A system where bots and humans can register their bot and X profile,
receiving unique tokens for authentication and verification.

Each bot gets a unique token ID.
Each user gets a unique token ID linked to their b

CLASSES:
- BotEntry: A registered bot in the tracker.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def to_public_any(self) -> dict
- UserEntry: A registered human user who owns bots.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def to_public_any(self) -> dict
- TokenEntry: A token in the registry for authentication.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- BotTrackerStore: In-memory store for Bot Tracker with JSON persistence.
Similar to AutoGramStore 
  Methods: def register_bot(self, handle: str, display_name: str, description: str='', x_profile: str='', websi
  Methods: def get_bot_by_id(self, bot_id: str) -> Optional[BotEntry]
  Methods: def get_bot_by_handle(self, handle: str) -> Optional[BotEntry]
  Methods: def get_bot_by_token(self, token_id: str) -> Optional[BotEntry]
  Methods: def update_bot(self, bot_id: str, **updates) -> Tuple[Optional[BotEntry], str]
  Methods: def list_bots(self, limit: int=50, offset: int=0, search: str='', verified_only: bool=False) -> list
  Methods: def register_user(self, username: str, email: str, display_name: str='', x_profile: str='') -> Tuple
  Methods: def get_user_by_id(self, user_id: str) -> Optional[UserEntry]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def generate_token_id() -> str
- def generate_bot_id() -> str
- def generate_user_id() -> str
- def hash_email(email: str) -> str
- def validate_handle(handle: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]
- def validate_x_profile(x_profile: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]
- def get_bot_tracker_store() -> BotTrackerStore
